mapper.select: SELECT id as businessId, 'LEAVE' as businessType, leave_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, leave_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_leave WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id as businessId, 'LEAVE' as businessType, leave_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, leave_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_leave WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id as businessId, 'LEAVE' as businessType, leave_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, leave_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_leave WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_leave WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id as businessId, 'LEAVE' as businessType, leave_no as businessNo, user_id as applyUserId, leave_type as title, reason as content, status, create_time as applyTime FROM oa_leave WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oa_leave WHERE current_approver_id = #{approverId} AND status = 'PENDING'
SELECT MAX(leave_no) FROM oa_leave WHERE leave_no LIKE CONCAT(#{pattern}, '%')
